# Petrified Toad

## Effect

- At the start of each combat, procure a Potion-Shaped Rock.

---
<!-- META-AGENT NOTES — do not edit above this line -->
## Strategy Notes

- Keep potion-slot pressure in mind; if full slots prevent the Rock from appearing, consider spending or replacing the weakest potion before important fights.
- Potion-Shaped Rock is frontloaded 15 damage, useful for hallway tempo and boss phase/target breakpoints without spending energy.
